mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO EVS_ITEM ( SEQ, RESUME_SEQ, GROUP_NO, ITEM_CODE, ITEM_NAME, ITEM_NAME_KO, REMARK, REMARK_KO, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNameKo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarkKo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1,
#{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 200,
#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE EVS_ITEM SET GROUP_NO = #{groupNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ITEM_CODE = #{itemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ITEM_NAME = #{itemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ITEM_NAME_KO = #{itemNameKo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK_KO = #{remarkKo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
UPDATE EVS_ITEM SET ACTIVITY = 2, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
